strings:
The tongue of a fat toad lashes
rapidly as it croaks.

A tongueless toad hops helplessly
before you as an eerie sound emanates
from your stomach. "The Jurors are on
Mt. Farview."

A small pond looks inviting.
Swim (y/n)?

You stumble across The Door to Hell!
Open (y/n)?

Only the barbaric may speak
to Brutal Bruno.

Bruno, Chief of the Barbaric Hills,
challenges your Barbarian to a test of
brute force. To the death.

King Kalohn eyes your party
appreciatively. He wonders if you
would give him the Element Orb and
the four Elemental Talons (y/n)?

King Kalohn the Conjurer thanks you
greatly. He then engages in an epic
battle with the Mega Dragon. History
has changed and he wins. Return
to the tenth century for further
instructions at Luxus Palace Royale.

You watch King Kalohn die as he
engages the mighty Mega Dragon. A wave
of water drowns the land as the Mega
Dragon approaches you.
Victory! Now return to the Jurors.

If only you'd had the Elemental Orb
and Talons...

A heavy oak table holds a lavish meal.
Fill your backpacks with food (y/n)?

You notice a gleaming, long metal
object stuck in a crack in the wall.
Pry it loose (y/n)?

After removing the object and cleaning
it off, you notice the inscription
"M-27 Radicon".

Mounds of stuff clutter the floor.
Grab an item (y/n)?

Lord Hoardall proclaims, "Only a
Crusader can help me with my never
ending need to accumulate stuff!"

strings:
The Bishop of Yellow Battle is locked
in a cage.

The Bishop of Yellow Battle is freed
from imprisonment by your yellow key
(+5000 exp). He grants all Yellow
Triple Crown winners 50,000 exp.

To win the Queen's Triple Crown, take
a Black Ticket to the Arena, Monster
Bowl, and Colosseum. After victory has
been achieved, return for your reward.

Nestled under a pile of dust, you see
what was once described to you as a
"J-26 Fluxer". Take it (y/n)?

Suddenly your party is moving very
slowly, yet everything around them is
moving very fast. By the time you
notice what has happened, a year has
passed.

Find my mirror image
and you will find
the way out.
